name: Nevasa HMC SA Administradora General De Fondos - Fondo de Inversion HMC Renta Global Pesos
summary: Nevasa HMC SA Administradora General De Fondos - Fondo de Inversion HMC Renta Global Pesos is a global fixed income fund denominated in Chilean Pesos (CLP). It is managed by Nevasa HMC SA Administradora General De Fondos. The fund aims to generate returns through investments in a diversified portfolio of global fixed income securities, while denominated in Chilean currency.
